SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class SecurityTransfer

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.TenantBaseID
grafioschtrader.entities.SecurityTransfer
@Entity public class SecurityTransfer extends TenantBaseID
Represents a security transfer between two securities accounts belonging to the same tenant. Creates a matching sell transaction in the source account and a buy transaction in the target account at the closing price on the transfer date.
